excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Sports Medicine and Health Science lists Priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority round: 31 January 2026 Final round: 30 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. Applications submitted after 31 January 2026 may be considered, subject to the availability of places.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
